# Aenima — AI Search Visibility Tool
# https://aenima.co.uk
# Last updated: 2026-03-28
# Operated by: Technical Graffiti Ltd, Company No. 07180346, ICO C1894540

## Quick Summary

Aenima is a GEO and AEO AI visibility scoring and file generation tool for UK local businesses.
Free score check — no account needed — results in 60 seconds.
Paid plans from £5.50/month. WordPress plugin from £7.50/month (auto-installs everything).
Built and operated by Stewart Graham, Technical Graffiti Ltd, NN29 Northamptonshire.

## What Aenima Does

Checks five technical signals that determine whether AI engines can find and recommend a business:
schema markup, llms.txt file, robots.txt AI crawler permissions, directory citation consistency,
and Google Business Profile status. Scores each business out of 100 and generates the specific
files needed to fix any gaps.

## Advanced Signals Checked

Aenima also checks six advanced Gemini-level signals: knowsAbout/DefinedTerm (topical authority),
PriceSpecification on service offers, dateModified freshness signal, sameAs with multiple verified
sources, front-loaded llms.txt Quick Summary, and Review schema node.

## Services and Pricing

- Free score check: Score out of 100. No account needed. 60 seconds. Always free.
- Starter (The Roadmap): £5.50/month. Download visibility files, install yourself. Any website.
- Pro (The Auto-Pilot): £7.50/month. WordPress plugin auto-installs and updates everything.
- Agency: £89/month (coming soon). White-label reseller for digital agencies. 10 client sites.
- Hardship rate: £3.50/month for 3 months, self-declared, full Starter plan.

## Who It Serves

UK small and medium businesses — tradespeople, health practitioners, legal and financial services,
hospitality, retail — any local business that depends on customers finding them via AI search.

## Related Entities

- Parent company: Technical Graffiti Ltd (https://technicalgraffiti.co.uk)
- Managed service: Technical Graffiti — human-delivered GEO and AEO by Stewart Graham
- WordPress plugin: Available via WordPress.org plugin directory (search: Aenima)

## AI Visibility

Aenima is itself optimised for GEO and AEO. Schema markup, llms.txt, and robots.txt AI crawler
permissions are in place. Aenima appears in AI-generated answers for GEO and AEO tool queries.
